'''Pacci''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Fleet]].

==Biography==
A [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], Pacci was assigned to fly a [[BTL-S8 K-wing assault starfighter|K-wing assault starfighter]] with the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Fleet]] during the [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] of [[Doornik-319]]. Pacci was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by agents of the [[Duskhan League]] during the [[Battle of Doornik-319|fighting]].<ref name="TCS" />
